title: Google integrates AI image, video tools into Demand Gen
text:
Google integrates AI image, video tools into Demand Gen
2025-11-18
Google introduced new AI-powered image tools to its Demand Gen advertising platform, including features like animated images that generate dynamic versions of existing assets and adaptable designs that add branded text overlays. These enhancements allow advertisers to quickly create diverse and optimized image assets, adjust aspect ratios with ease and expand campaigns across various placements without additional manual effort.
